title: helichrysum forskahlii
intro: Helichrysum forskahlii, also known as Coleus forskohlii, is a plant species native to tropical regions of India and Thailand, characterized by its yellow flowers and slender stems. The plant's roots contain forskolin, a bioactive compound that has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and vasodilatory effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum forskahlii include weight loss, improved cardiovascular health, and increased bone density, making it a popular ingredient in herbal supplements. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including capsules, tablets, and liquid extracts, which are often used to support weight management and overall well-being.
